Secret Letter

💌

Dear Ranjana,

🌹 ✦ 🌹

There are people who walk into your life like a quiet morning — gently, without announcement — and somehow make everything feel a little warmer, a little brighter. You are exactly that kind of person.

You have this rare, beautiful quality of making the ordinary feel special. Your smile is the kind that lingers in a room long after you've left it. Your presence is something people quietly hold onto, even when they don't say so aloud.

Today, on your birthday, I want you to know that you are seen. Not just the version of you that laughs and shines in photos — but the quiet you, the thinking you, the dreaming you. Every part of you is worth celebrating.

May this year bring you everything your heart has been too humble to ask for. May you be loved the way you deserve — deeply, and without conditions. May your days be filled with golden moments that feel exactly like the warmth you give to everyone around you.

You deserve every rose, every candle, every wish made on your behalf today — and a thousand more.

🌹 ✦ 🌹

With all the warmth in the world,

Someone who is glad you exist 🌹

Happy Birthday, Ranjana 🌹

✦ May your day be as beautiful as you are ✦
